tool.name: Mac Write Clipboard
tool.description: Write text content to the Mac clipboard (pasteboard).

content.description: Text content to write to clipboard

ai.systemPromptSection:
### mac_clipboard_write
Write text to the Mac clipboard.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool": "mac_clipboard_write", "query": "{\"content\": \"text to copy\"}"}
```

**Parameters:**
- content: Text to write to clipboard (required)

**Returns:** success boolean
whenToUse: User explicitly asks to copy something
User wants text put on clipboard
whenNotToUse: Just showing code - let user copy manually
